data.description:
## Incident Overview

Same root cause as 999e-cf69 but across 15 test files. Under set -uo pipefail, echo "$large_var" | grep -qE exits with SIGPIPE (141) when grep -q exits early after finding a match. Pipefail reports pipeline failure, making if conditions false even though grep matched.

50 instances found across: test-implementation-plan-task-description.sh (currently failing), test-fix-bug-intent-conflict-handling.sh, test-merge-to-main-resume-cwd.sh, test-merge-to-main.sh, test-harvest-worktree.sh, test-ui-designer-agent.sh, test-ticket-lib-api.sh, test-merge-to-main-cleanliness.sh, test-check-contract-schemas.sh, and others.

Fix: replace echo "$var" | grep -q with grep -q <<< "$var" (here-string, avoids pipe) or grep -q "$FILE" directly (when file path available).
data.title: [tests]: echo|grep-q+pipefail SIGPIPE -> systematic false-negatives across 15 test files in CI
